category_sources: source_facts.description: tool to create, edit, and run self-contained source-only Java programs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jbang; official project branding uses JBang.
docs_sources: Official source_facts.homepage is jbang.dev; its /documentation/guide/latest/ path is the dedicated official guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/jbangdev/jbang; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a Java command-line scripting tool.
